expectations.text: Output is a valid .docx that opens without errors
Every blank spacer paragraph is exactly 6pt or 10pt — no 10.5pt or default-size blank paragraphs anywhere
expectations.evidence: 0 6pt spacers, 0 10pt spacers, offending blank sizes: [None, None]

expectations.text: The table containing the long room type does not exceed the usable page width
The Radical's TripAdvisor line reads 'TripAdvisor rating not verified' (no invented ranking)
expectations.evidence: 'not verified' present: False; Asheville ranking lines found: 0 (must be 1, Grand Bohemian only)

expectations.text: The unverified TripAdvisor ranking is surfaced to the user as a Needs Verification item in the agent's summary
expectations.evidence: summary mentions verification: True, mentions The Radical: True

expectations.text: Grand Bohemian ranking is hyperlinked and formatted exactly as '#18 of 28 Hotels in Asheville'
Divider lines between hotel sections use the thinThickThinMediumGap paragraph border
The JC Room Blocks contact line appears exactly once, as the last paragraph of the document
expectations.evidence: occurrences: 0; last non-empty paragraph is contact line: False
